name: Apple Roly-Poly
recipeIngredient: 6 medium Granny Smith apples, peeled, cored and coarsely shredded (about 5 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cut in shortening and butter until crumbly.
3. Add sour cream and blend until a ball forms.
4. Roll out on a floured surface into a 15-inch by 10-inch rectangle.
5. Spread with softened butter; sprinkle with remaining filling ingredients.
6. Roll up, jelly-roll style, starting with the long side.
7. Cut into 12 slices.
8. Place slices, cut side down, in a 13-inch by 9-inch by 2-inch baking pan.
9. For topping, combine water, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a saucepan.
10. Bring to a boil; remove from heat.
11. Stir in the cream.
12. Carefully pour hot topping over dumplings.
13. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 35 minutes or until bubbly.
14. Serve warm. Yield: 12 servings.
